title: Stefan Gierasch

Retrieved July 3, 2021.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

American actor (1926–2014)

| Stefan Gierasch | |
| --- | --- |
| Born | (1926-02-05)February 5, 1926  [New York City, New York](/wiki/New_York_City,_New_York "New York City, New York"), U.S. |
| Died | September 6, 2014(2014-09-06) (aged 88)  [Santa Monica, California](/wiki/Santa_Monica,_California "Santa Monica, California"), U.S. |
| Occupation | Actor |
| Years active | 1951–2009 |

**Stefan Gierasch** (February 5, 1926 – September 6, 2014)[[1]](#cite_note-1) was an American film and television actor.

## Personal life

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Stefan_Gierasch&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Personal life")]

Gierasch was a native of New York and studied at [The Actors Studio](/wiki/The_Actors_Studio "The Actors Studio").

Gierasch was married 33 years to actress Hedy Sontag, at the time of his death. They have three children: Amanda, Elisa and Matthew.

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Stefan_Gierasch&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Career")]

Gierasch made over 100 screen appearances, mostly in American television, beginning in 1951. In the mid-1960s, he performed with the Trinity Square Players in [Providence](/wiki/Providence,_Rhode_Island "Providence, Rhode Island"), [Rhode Island](/wiki/Rhode_Island "Rhode Island"). He appeared in dozens of films including in *[The Hustler](/wiki/The_Hustler "The Hustler")* (1961), *[The Traveling Executioner](/wiki/The_Traveling_Executioner "The Traveling Executioner")* (1970), *[Jeremiah Johnson](/wiki/Jeremiah_Johnson_(film) "Jeremiah Johnson (film)")* (1972), *[What's Up Doc?](/wiki/What%27s_Up,_Doc%3F_(1972_film) "What's Up, Doc? (1972 film)")* (1972), *[High Plains Drifter](/wiki/High_Plains_Drifter "High Plains Drifter")* (1973), *[Carrie](/wiki/Carrie_(1976_film) "Carrie (1976 film)")* (1976), *[Silver Streak](/wiki/Silver_Streak_(film) "Silver Streak (film)")* (1976), *[Victory at Entebbe](/wiki/Victory_at_Entebbe "Victory at Entebbe")* (1976), *[Blue Sunshine](/wiki/Blue_Sunshine_(film) "Blue Sunshine (film)")* (1977), *[The Champ](/wiki/The_Champ_(1979_film) "The Champ (1979 film)")* (1979), *[Blood Beach](/wiki/Blood_Beach "Blood Beach")* (1980) and *[Perfect](/wiki/Perfect_(1985_film) "Perfect (1985 film)")* (1985).

In 1994 he appeared in the [Arnold Schwarzenegger](/wiki/Arnold_Schwarzenegger "Arnold Schwarzenegger") and [Danny DeVito](/wiki/Danny_DeVito "Danny DeVito") film *[Junior](/wiki/Junior_(1994_film) "Junior (1994 film)")* as Edward Sawyer, and in 1995's *[Murder in the First](/wiki/Murder_in_the_First_(film) "Murder in the First (film)")* as Warden James Humson. Gierasch made many TV appearances, as in *[Kung Fu](/wiki/Kung_Fu_(1972_TV_series) "Kung Fu (1972 TV series)")*, *[M\*A\*S\*H](/wiki/M*A*S*H_(TV_series) "M*A*S*H (TV series)")*, *[Starsky & Hutch](/wiki/Starsky_%26_Hutch "Starsky & Hutch")*, *[Gunsmoke](/wiki/Gunsmoke "Gunsmoke")* (1966 S12E6’s “Gunfighter, RIP”), *[Star Trek: The Next Generation](/wiki/Star_Trek:_The_Next_Generation "Star Trek: The Next Generation")*, *[Barney Miller](/wiki/Barney_Miller "Barney Miller")* and *[ER](/wiki/ER_(TV_series) "ER (TV series)")*.

## Death

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Stefan_Gierasch&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Death")]

Gierasch died at home from a stroke in 2014 at the age of 88.[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Selected filmography

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Stefan_Gierasch&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Selected filmography")]

* *[The Young Don't Cry](/wiki/The_Young_Don%27t_Cry "The Young Don't Cry")* (1957) – Billy
* *[That Kind of Woman](/wiki/That_Kind_of_Woman "That Kind of Woman")* (1959) – Soldier (uncredited)
* *[The Hustler](/wiki/The_Hustler "The Hustler")* (1961) – Preacher
* *[The Alfred Hitchcock Hour](/wiki/The_Alfred_Hitchcock_Hour "The Alfred Hitchcock Hour")* (1963) (Season 1 Episode 22: "Diagnosis: Danger") - Sergeant Boyle
* *[The Traveling Executioner](/wiki/The_Traveling_Executioner "The Traveling Executioner")* (1970) – Willy Herzallerliebst
* *[What's Up Doc?](/wiki/What%27s_Up,_Doc%3F_(1972_film) "What's Up, Doc? (1972 film)")* (1972) – Fritz
* *[Jeremiah Johnson](/wiki/Jeremiah_Johnson_(film) "Jeremiah Johnson (film)")* (1972) – Del Gue
* *[The New Centurions](/wiki/The_New_Centurions "The New Centurions")* (1972) – Landlord
* *[High Plains Drifter](/wiki/High_Plains_Drifter "High Plains Drifter")* (1973) – Mayor Jason Hobart
* *[Claudine](/wiki/Claudine_(film) "Claudine (film)")* (1974) – Sanitation Foreman
* *[Cornbread, Earl and Me](/wiki/Cornbread,_Earl_and_Me "Cornbread, Earl and Me")* (1975) – Sergeant Danaher
* *[The Great Texas Dynamite Chase](/wiki/The_Great_Texas_Dynamite_Chase "The Great Texas Dynamite Chase")* (1976) – Hotel Clerk
* *[Carrie](/wiki/Carrie_(1976_film) "Carrie (1976 film)")* (1976) – Mr. Morton
* *[Silver Streak](/wiki/Silver_Streak_(film) "Silver Streak (film)")* (1976) – Professor Schreiner & Johnson
* *[Victory at Entebbe](/wiki/Victory_at_Entebbe "Victory at Entebbe")* (1976) – General Mordecai Gur
* *[Blue Sunshine](/wiki/Blue_Sunshine_(film) "Blue Sunshine (film)")* (1977) – Lieutenant Jennings
* *[The Champ](/wiki/The_Champ_(1979_film) "The Champ (1979 film)")* (1979) – Charlie Goodman
* *[Blood Beach](/wiki/Blood_Beach "Blood Beach")* (1980) – Dr. Dimitrios
* *[Perfect](/wiki/Perfect_(1985_film) "Perfect (1985 film)")* (1985) – Charlie
* *[The Rosary Murders](/wiki/The_Rosary_Murders "The Rosary Murders")* (1987) – Trupiano
* *[Spellbinder](/wiki/Spellbinder_(film) "Spellbinder (film)")* (1988) – Edgar DeWitt
* *[Miami Vice](/wiki/Miami_Vice "Miami Vice")* episode 5x16 "Victim of Circumstance" (1989)
* *[Megaville](/wiki/Megaville "Megaville")* (1990) – Dr. Vogel
* *[Dark Shadows](/wiki/Dark_Shadows "Dark Shadows")* (1991) - Prof Woodard/ Joshua Collins
* *[Mistress](/wiki/Mistress_(1992_film) "Mistress (1992 film)")* (1992) – Stuart Stratland, Sr.
* *[Jack the Bear](/wiki/Jack_the_Bear "Jack the Bear")* (1993) – Father-in-Law
* *[Dave](/wiki/Dave_(film) "Dave (film)")* (1993) – House Majority Leader
* *[Junior](/wiki/Junior_(1994_film) "Junior (1994 film)")* (1994) – Edward Sawyer
* *[Murder in the First](/wiki/Murder_in_the_First_(film) "Murder in the First (film)")* (1995) – Warden James Humson
* *Starry Night* (1999) – Professor Beckmore
* *[Legend of the Phantom Rider](/wiki/Legend_of_the_Phantom_Rider "Legend of the Phantom Rider")* (2002) – Nathan
* *The Hunter's Moon* (2009) – The Sage (final film role)
